name: Autumn Wild Rice, Walnut, and Broccoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound broccoli florets, steamed until crisp-tender
1/2 cup broken walnut pieces, toasted or pecans
1 tablespoon red wine vinegar or sherry vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil and add the rice. Add salt to taste, bring back to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for about 40 minutes until the rice is tender.
2. Drain and toss with the broccoli, nuts, and parsley.
3. Meanwhile, steam the broccoli and chop the nuts.
4. Mix together the lemon juice, vinegar, garlic, and yogurt. Whisk in the walnut oil and add salt and pepper.
5. Toss with the rice mixture, correct the seasonings, and serve. If refrigerating, add the broccoli and parsley shortly before serving to retain their bright color.
Note: Serves 4-6 (Shulman) or 3-4 (our estimation).
